927d12ac: # Thank You for Contributing to the Kecare Theme Ecosystem
27ec39bd: Kecare is still in its early stages, and its theme ecosystem is far less developed compared to other blog or documentation site frameworks. Therefore, Kecare warmly welcomes contributions to its themes, inviting everyone to help build and enrich the Kecare theme ecosystem~
77a37628: This directory will guide you on how to start writing a theme for everyone to use
